name: Climate Disaster Prevention

phase_0.boundary_condition: Planetary biosphere carrying capacity and atmospheric CO2 threshold

VINIT.justification: Represents the uninitialized void before human intervention and measurement systems are deployed; the seed state of Earth's climate before tracking begins.

TANCH.justification: Acts as the closed boundary that contains the entire prevention system; the constitutional limit that defines the operational envelope of the climate architecture.

AFWD.justification: Directed transformation toward a target; forward deployment of mitigation strategies and policy implementation moving the system toward stabilization.

AREV.justification: Reverse/descent transformation; retroactive analysis and carbon capture processes that pull the system backward to correct past deviations.

CLINK.justification: Sequential chaining of morphisms; linking satellite telemetry, ground sensors, and legislative frameworks into a continuous operational pipeline.

IMSCRIB.justification: Self-reference and self-recognition; the planetary health metric that continuously verifies its own measurement integrity against the baseline.

FSPLIT.justification: Co-multiplication that branches the unified risk framework into two distinct operational pathways: adaptation infrastructure and mitigation emissions reduction.

FFUSE.justification: Multiplication that reconstitutes the original risk assessment framework exactly by merging the adaptation and mitigation outputs back into a single strategic input.

EVALT.justification: Affirmative branch; positive evaluation where disaster prevention thresholds are met and resources are correctly allocated.

EVALF.justification: Negative branch; negative evaluation where warning systems detect impending breach and standard protocols are insufficient.

ENGAGR.chosen_element: Economic growth and ecological preservation mandate
ENGAGR.justification: Paradice state; both simultaneous development and conservation goals are held without resolution, requiring continuous dynamic balancing.

IFIX.justification: ROM fixation; irreversible append-only record of emission reductions and policy commitments that cannot be rolled back or altered.

phase_3.void_description: Pre-anthropogenic baseline / unmeasured climate state before any tracking or intervention systems are initialized
phase_3.true_description: Stabilized climate metrics / successful prevention protocol active with resources correctly allocated
phase_3.false_description: Critical threshold breach / prevention failure state where standard mitigation pathways are insufficient
phase_3.both_description: Dual-mandate operational state / simultaneous mitigation and adaptation deployment under resource constraints

steps.domain_action: Initialize pre-anthropogenic climate baseline as the uninitialized void state
Anchor the system to planetary biosphere carrying capacity as the closed boundary
Forward deploy renewable energy transition protocols toward stabilization target
Reverse extract historical atmospheric carbon data for baseline correction
Chain sequential satellite telemetry to ground monitoring stations
Self-reference global temperature anomaly index for system integrity verification
Branch integrated climate risk assessment into adaptation and mitigation pathways
Affirm successful early warning system activation on the T-arm
Route forward resource allocation to adaptation branch
Flag negative coastal infrastructure resilience metric on the F-arm
Route reverse ecological degradation analysis to mitigation branch
Hold dual-mandate paradice of economic growth and ecological preservation
Reconstitute unified climate strategy from dual pathways back to original framework
Chain fused strategy into multi-national policy implementation pipeline
Record permanent carbon credit ledger entry as irreversible append-only state
Self-verify ecosystem recovery metrics against pre-anthropogenic baseline
Forward deploy geoengineering contingency protocols for residual risk
Reverse decommission legacy fossil fuel infrastructure to close feedback loop
Chain disaster response telemetry back into prevention modeling
Affirm successful disaster prevention threshold maintained across regions
Flag negative biodiversity loss acceleration rate requiring intervention
Hold simultaneous crisis response and long-term adaptation paradice
Reconstitute integrated disaster resilience framework from parallel actions
Record irreversible atmospheric composition measurement as permanent witness
Self-recognize closed-loop prevention system state for continuous calibration
Seal comprehensive climate disaster prevention architecture within carrying capacity

phase_5.compiler_frontend: IPCC assessment framework / policy translation engine
phase_5.ipc_mechanism: Global climate telemetry network / satellite data exchange protocol
phase_5.memory_mechanism: Paleoclimate ice core archive / real-time sensor mesh
phase_5.scheduler_mechanism: Seasonal ecological cycles / policy implementation timelines
phase_5.alfs_store: UNFCCC baseline repository / Paris Agreement reference store

phase_6.pre_cycle_state: Unstructured climate data / fragmented mitigation efforts
phase_6.post_cycle_state: Integrated prevention strategy / stabilized risk metrics
phase_6.delta_s_verdict: ΔS ≈ 0 — Information gain from continuous monitoring exactly offsets coordination entropy; closed-loop feedback maintains systemic order without net disorder accumulation.

lean_scaffold:
-- IGProtocol scaffold: VINIT → TANCH → AFWD → AREV → CLINK → IMSCRIB → FSPLIT → EVALT → AFWD → EVALF → AREV → ENGAGR → FFUSE → CLINK → IFIX → IMSCRIB → AFWD → AREV → CLINK → EVALT → EVALF → ENGAGR → FFUSE → IFIX → IMSCRIB → TANCH
-- Class: Climate Disaster Prevention
-- Fingerprint: sig=(15,3,6,2)
--   self_ref=False | frobenius_order=1
--   dialetheia_complete=True | period=26
-- Expected tier: O₂
-- FSPLIT/FFUSE pairs: [(6, 12)]

import Imscribing.IGMorphism
import Imscribing.IGFunctor

namespace Imscribing
open Primitives Frobenius IGProtocol
open Dimensionality Topology Relational Polarity Grammar
     Fidelity KineticChar Granularity Criticality Protection Stoichiometry Chirality

-- ── Token → IG field mapping ──────────────────────────────────────────────
--   [0] VINIT     dim    := 𐑼               𐑼 → 𐑡  | initial object — ground of distinction
--   [1] TANCH     top    := 𐑡               𐑼 → 𐑾  | terminal object — connectivity boundary
--   [2] AFWD      rel    := 𐑾               𐑡 → 𐑗  | forward morphism — bidirectional arrow
--   [3] AREV      pol    := 𐑗               𐑾 → 𐑱  | reverse morphism — parity flip
--   [4] CLINK     fid    := 𐑱               𐑗 → 𐑠  | composition — regime coherence
--   [5] IMSCRIB   gram   := 𐑠               𐑱 → 𐑚  | identity — self-imscription
--   [6] FSPLIT    gran   := 𐑚               𐑚 → 𐑚  | split δ — range decomposition
--   [7] EVALT     crit   := ⊙               𐑚 → 𐑙  | evaluate-true — criticality gate open
--   [8] AFWD      rel    := 𐑾               𐑚 → 𐑙  | forward morphism — bidirectional arrow
--   [9] EVALF     chir   := 𐑖               𐑚 → 𐑙  | evaluate-false — chirality check
--   [10] AREV      pol    := 𐑗               𐑚 → 𐑙  | reverse morphism — parity flip
--   [11] ENGAGR    stoi   := 𐑳               𐑚 → 𐑙  | engage paradox — B-state, both arms
--   [12] FFUSE     stoi   := 𐑙               𐑙 → 𐑱  | fuse μ — assembly mode
--   [13] CLINK     fid    := 𐑱               𐑙 → 𐑭  | composition — regime coherence
--   [14] IFIX      prot   := 𐑭               𐑱 → 𐑠  | irreversible fixation — winding number
--   [15] IMSCRIB   gram   := 𐑠               𐑭 → 𐑾  | identity — self-imscription
--   [16] AFWD      rel    := 𐑾               𐑠 → 𐑗  | forward morphism — bidirectional arrow
--   [17] AREV      pol    := 𐑗               𐑾 → 𐑱  | reverse morphism — parity flip
--   [18] CLINK     fid    := 𐑱               𐑗 → ⊙  | composition — regime coherence
--   [19] EVALT     crit   := ⊙               𐑱 → 𐑖  | evaluate-true — criticality gate open
--   [20] EVALF     chir   := 𐑖               ⊙ → 𐑳  | evaluate-false — chirality check
--   [21] ENGAGR    stoi   := 𐑳               𐑖 → 𐑙  | engage paradox — B-state, both arms
--   [22] FFUSE     stoi   := 𐑙               𐑳 → 𐑭  | fuse μ — assembly mode
--   [23] IFIX      prot   := 𐑭               𐑙 → 𐑠  | irreversible fixation — winding number
--   [24] IMSCRIB   gram   := 𐑠               𐑭 → 𐑡  | identity — self-imscription
--   [25] TANCH     top    := 𐑡               𐑠 → 𐑼  | terminal object — connectivity boundary

-- ── Main IGProtocol term ────────────────────────────────────────────────────

noncomputable def climate_disaster_prevention_protocol : IGProtocol 𐑼 𐑡 :=
  .withGram 𐑠 <|
  -- Seq chain:
  (.arrow 𐑼 𐑼 𐑡)  -- [0] VINIT | dim := 𐑼 | initial object — ground of distinction (Initialize pre-anthropogenic climate baseline as the uninitialized void state)
  (.arrow 𐑡 𐑼 𐑾)  -- [1] TANCH | top := 𐑡 | terminal object — connectivity boundary (Anchor the system to planetary biosphere carrying capacity as the closed boun...)
  (.arrow 𐑾 𐑡 𐑗)  -- [2] AFWD | rel := 𐑾 | forward morphism — bidirectional arrow (Forward deploy renewable energy transition protocols toward stabilization target)
  (.arrow 𐑗 𐑾 𐑱)  -- [3] AREV | pol := 𐑗 | reverse morphism — parity flip (Reverse extract historical atmospheric carbon data for baseline correction)
  (.arrow 𐑱 𐑗 𐑠)  -- [4] CLINK | fid := 𐑱 | composition — regime coherence (Chain sequential satellite telemetry to ground monitoring stations)
  (.arrow 𐑠 𐑱 𐑚)  -- [5] IMSCRIB | gram := 𐑠 | identity — self-imscription (Self-reference global temperature anomaly index for system integrity verifica...)
  -- FSPLIT [6] (gran := 𐑚) (Branch integrated climate risk assessment into adaptation and mitigation pathways) / FFUSE [12] (stoi := 𐑙)
  .seq
    (.prod
      -- T-branch (2 nodes)
      .seq
        (.arrow ⊙ 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [7] EVALT | crit := ⊙ | evaluate-true — criticality gate open (Affirm successful early warning system activation on the T-arm)
        (.arrow 𐑾 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [8] AFWD | rel := 𐑾 | forward morphism — bidirectional arrow (Route forward resource allocation to adaptation branch)
      -- F-branch (3 nodes)
      .seq
        (.arrow 𐑖 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [9] EVALF | chir := 𐑖 | evaluate-false — chirality check (Flag negative coastal infrastructure resilience metric on the F-arm)
      .seq
        (.arrow 𐑗 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [10] AREV | pol := 𐑗 | reverse morphism — parity flip (Route reverse ecological degradation analysis to mitigation branch)
        (.arrow 𐑳 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [11] ENGAGR | stoi := 𐑳 | engage paradox — B-state, both arms (Hold dual-mandate paradice of economic growth and ecological preservation))
    -- reconnect at FFUSE [12]: μ closes the Frobenius pair
    (.arrow 𐑙 𐑙 𐑱)  -- [12] FFUSE | stoi := 𐑙 (Reconstitute unified climate strategy from dual pathways back to original framework)
  (.arrow 𐑱 𐑙 𐑭)  -- [13] CLINK | fid := 𐑱 | composition — regime coherence (Chain fused strategy into multi-national policy implementation pipeline)
  (.arrow 𐑭 𐑱 𐑠)  -- [14] IFIX | prot := 𐑭 | irreversible fixation — winding number (Record permanent carbon credit ledger entry as irreversible append-only state)
  (.arrow 𐑠 𐑭 𐑾)  -- [15] IMSCRIB | gram := 𐑠 | identity — self-imscription (Self-verify ecosystem recovery metrics against pre-anthropogenic baseline)
  (.arrow 𐑾 𐑠 𐑗)  -- [16] AFWD | rel := 𐑾 | forward morphism — bidirectional arrow (Forward deploy geoengineering contingency protocols for residual risk)
  (.arrow 𐑗 𐑾 𐑱)  -- [17] AREV | pol := 𐑗 | reverse morphism — parity flip (Reverse decommission legacy fossil fuel infrastructure to close feedback loop)
  (.arrow 𐑱 𐑗 ⊙)  -- [18] CLINK | fid := 𐑱 | composition — regime coherence (Chain disaster response telemetry back into prevention modeling)
  (.arrow ⊙ 𐑱 𐑖)  -- [19] EVALT | crit := ⊙ | evaluate-true — criticality gate open (Affirm successful disaster prevention threshold maintained across regions)
  (.arrow 𐑖 ⊙ 𐑳)  -- [20] EVALF | chir := 𐑖 | evaluate-false — chirality check (Flag negative biodiversity loss acceleration rate requiring intervention)
  (.arrow 𐑳 𐑖 𐑙)  -- [21] ENGAGR | stoi := 𐑳 | engage paradox — B-state, both arms (Hold simultaneous crisis response and long-term adaptation paradice)
  (.arrow 𐑙 𐑳 𐑭)  -- [22] FFUSE | stoi := 𐑙 | fuse μ — assembly mode (Reconstitute integrated disaster resilience framework from parallel actions)
  (.arrow 𐑭 𐑙 𐑠)  -- [23] IFIX | prot := 𐑭 | irreversible fixation — winding number (Record irreversible atmospheric composition measurement as permanent witness)
  (.arrow 𐑠 𐑭 𐑡)  -- [24] IMSCRIB | gram := 𐑠 | identity — self-imscription (Self-recognize closed-loop prevention system state for continuous calibration)
  (.arrow 𐑡 𐑠 𐑼)  -- [25] TANCH | top := 𐑡 | terminal object — connectivity boundary (Seal comprehensive climate disaster prevention architecture within carrying c...)

-- ── Evaluation arm sub-defs ─────────────────────────────────────────────────

-- truth arm
noncomputable def climate_disaster_prevention_true_arm : IGProtocol 𐑼 𐑡 :=
  (climate_disaster_prevention_protocol).restrictToEVALT

-- false arm
noncomputable def climate_disaster_prevention_false_arm : IGProtocol 𐑼 𐑡 :=
  (climate_disaster_prevention_protocol).restrictToEVALF

-- ── Verification theorems ───────────────────────────────────────────────────

theorem climate_disaster_prevention_tier : TierFunctor.obj 𐑼 = .O₂ := by decide

-- Frobenius (split → fuse): μ∘δ = id on .prod branch
-- Proof: apply igFrobAlg_self_fusion; exact mu_delta_A_id
-- (requires mu_delta_A_id from IGFunctor library)

end Imscribing
